<think>
The user is asking to "Return the three-line status record." The fields are: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. They gave an example packet_id, but we should only output the three lines.

The request: "packet_id=HVSMW2-357F83165A62BC33EE46 status_values: route_verdict=CONTINUE repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-BE75A69E blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it Return the three-line status record."

We must output exactly:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-BE75A69E
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

Make sure no extra headings, no JSON, no markdown. Plain text.

Thus final answer.
</think>

repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-BE75A69E
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
